title: Best Practices for Branching Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git branching best practices.

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using descriptive branch names?
options: It helps other developers understand the purpose of each branch
It deletes old commits by mistake

questions.question: Regarding the branching best practices, how frequently should you merge your branches back into the main development line?
options: As frequently as possible to avoid long-running branches and complex conflicts

questions.question: When should you use a new branch in Git?
options: For every feature, bug fix, or experiment
